response.justification: While Bogdan is an accomplished software engineer with 13+ years of experience and strong fundamentals in software craftsmanship, he is a fundamentally poor fit for this role. The position requires native-level Japanese proficiency (not mentioned anywhere on the resume) and specialized expertise in embedded networking security (MACsec, 802.1X, kernel analysis, switch architecture), areas where his career shows minimal engagement. His background is heavily web/product-focused (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS), and his last embedded systems work was a 6-month C/C++ role over 10 years ago. The domain expertise gap is too large to bridge practically.
strengths: Extensive senior-level software engineering experience (13+ years) with demonstrable expertise in software craftsmanship, TDD, CI/CD, and system design
Proven ability to work at multiple system levels including low-latency backend infrastructure, DevOps, and infrastructure management
Polyglot programmer experienced across C, C++, multiple scripting languages, and able to quickly learn new technology domains
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed; role explicitly requires native-level fluency, making this a hard blocker
Career trajectory for past 8+ years is web/product development (TypeScript, Node.js, React); minimal embedded systems or security engineering experience demonstrated

Missing required technical expertise: no evidence of Linux kernel source code analysis, embedded firmware development, network security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X), or switch/networking infrastructure knowledge

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking or security domain expertise
